top_signals.title: FIFA Prepares for World Cup 2026
top_signals.summary: FIFA is offering assurances to New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani that fans may bring water into World Cup stadiums — within certain rules. Mamdani raised concerns Thursday about reports that FIFA had banned fans from bringing bottles of water to World Cup matches, demanding answers from FIFA. Bloomberg Opinion Business of Sports Columnist Adam Minter joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
